name: delegate_task
description: Delegate a task to a specialized sub-agent within the Network-AI swarm. The swarm uses a shared blackboard for coordination. Use this to route work to agents like data_analyst, strategy_advisor, or risk_assessor.

targetAgent.description: The identifier of the target agent to receive the task (e.g. data_analyst, strategy_advisor, risk_assessor)

taskPayload.description: The task context, instructions, and any required data

priority.description: Task priority level for queue ordering. Defaults to normal.

timeout.description: Maximum execution time in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000.

requiresAuth.description: Whether this task requires AuthGuardian permission grant before execution.

name: query_swarm_state
description: Query the current state of the agent swarm — active tasks, blackboard contents, agent availability, and permission grants.

scope.description: The scope of state information to retrieve. Defaults to all.

agentFilter.description: Optional list of agent IDs to filter results

includeHistory.description: Include historical task execution data. Defaults to false.

name: spawn_parallel_agents
description: Spawn multiple sub-agents in parallel for complex task decomposition. Results are combined using a synthesis strategy.

tasks.description: Array of parallel tasks to execute simultaneously

synthesisStrategy.description: How to combine results from parallel agents. Defaults to merge.

name: request_permission
description: Request permission from AuthGuardian before accessing a protected resource type. Always call this before DATABASE, PAYMENTS, EMAIL, or FILE_EXPORT operations.

resourceType.description: The type of protected resource being requested

justification.description: Clear reason for requesting access — must be specific to the current task

scope.description: Specific scope of access needed (e.g. read:invoices, read:revenue)

name: update_blackboard
description: Write or update an entry on the shared blackboard for cross-agent coordination. The blackboard persists state between agents.

value.description: The data to store — can be any JSON-serializable value

ttl.description: Time-to-live in seconds. Entry expires and returns null after this duration.
